goals: Understand how compound interest works by calculating future value of an investment
Explore how different interest rates affect growth over time using a comparison table
Use the web UI to visualize and explore calculations for the history paper

user_agent_config.personality: Curious and eager to learn, but not familiar with financial calculations. Prefers visual tools and concrete examples over abstract formulas.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Understands basic math concepts but has no experience with financial formulas, compound interest, or investment calculations. Does not know tool names or internal APIs.

end_condition: The student has explored compound interest calculations and generated comparison data to support their history paper understanding of how money grows over time.
